title: HeyGen Video Avatar Tool
description: Video avatar creation tool for AI influencers. $24/mo creator plan (36 credits). Custom avatars via 2-5min video upload. Professional talking head quality beats D-ID. 80%+ of AI influencer videos use this or D-ID.
actionable_steps: 1. Subscribe to HeyGen Creator ($24/mo) 2. Upload custom avatar video or use library avatars 3. Generate scripts via AI 4. Create talking head videos 5. Add captions via CapCut 6. Post to TikTok/Instagram
reviewer_notes: Tool for video avatar creation. Industry standard for AI influencers.

title: ElevenLabs Voice Synthesis
description: Voice consistency tool for AI personas. $22/mo creator plan (100k chars). Professional voice cloning. Critical for maintaining consistent AI character voice across all content. Used by 90%+ of AI influencers.
actionable_steps: 1. Subscribe to ElevenLabs Creator ($22/mo) 2. Select base voice from library or clone custom voice 3. Lock voice settings for consistency 4. Use same voice for ALL content 5. Adjust stability/clarity per content type
reviewer_notes: Voice synthesis critical for AI persona consistency. Non-negotiable tool.

title: Leonardo.ai Consistent Character Generation
description: Character consistency feature for AI influencer visuals. $12/mo starter plan. Train character model on 10-20 images then generate consistent face across poses/settings. Beats Midjourney for photorealistic consistency.
actionable_steps: 1. Subscribe to Leonardo.ai ($12/mo) 2. Generate initial character 3. Train character model on 10-20 images 4. Use character model for all future generations 5. Build expression library 6. Build pose library
reviewer_notes: Visual consistency tool. Critical for AI influencer credibility.

title: AI Influencer Diversified Revenue Streams
description: Sponsored posts $100-$1000+ per post (month 3+). Affiliate 5-30% commissions (month 1+). Digital products $10-$500 per sale (month 3+). Subscriptions $5-$50/mo per member (month 3+). Brand ambassadorships $500-$5k/mo (month 6+). Target: 10k+ followers for consistent brand deals.
actionable_steps: 1. Build to 10k followers via consistent posting 2. Start affiliate monetization immediately 3. Add digital products at month 3 4. Pitch sponsorships at month 3 5. Scale to brand ambassadorships at month 6 6. Track revenue by stream in FUNNEL_METRICS.csv
reviewer_notes: Revenue model overview for AI influencers. Diversification key.

title: ASMR AI Persona Revenue Strategy
description: ASMR niche: YouTube ads $2-10 CPM on long-form (30min-2hr). Patreon $5-20/mo tiers. Sponsorships $500-5k/video from sleep/wellness brands (Calm Headspace Casper Purple). Low risk high engagement. Audio-only or minimal face-on-camera reduces AI detection concerns.
actionable_steps: 1. Choose ASMR style (triggers roleplay ambient) 2. Generate consistent AI persona 3. Set up ElevenLabs voice 4. Create 30min+ videos 5. Upload to YouTube with SEO titles 6. Add Patreon link 7. Pitch sleep brand sponsorships at 10k subs
reviewer_notes: ASMR niche strategy for AI influencers. Lower barrier to entry.

title: Financial Domination AI Persona Revenue
description: Findom niche: Tributes $20-100+. Custom content $50-500. Drain sessions $100-1000+. Subscriptions $20-50/mo. Platforms: Twitter/X for discovery LoyalFans for monetization. High revenue per user but requires persona development and community engagement. Legal: adult verification consent documentation required.
actionable_steps: 1. Develop luxury aesthetic AI persona 2. Create commanding voice/tone 3. Set up X + LoyalFans accounts 4. Post tribute demands lifestyle flex 5. Engage findom community 6. Convert followers to paying subs 7. Screen for chargebacks 8. Maintain clear consent ToS
reviewer_notes: High-revenue niche but higher risk. Adult content compliance required.

title: AI Influencer Double Disclosure Requirement
description: AI-generated content needs TWO disclosures: 1) Sponsored/affiliate disclosure 2) AI-generated disclosure. NY law requires AI disclosure for ads starting June 2026. Placement must be conspicuous before affiliate link. Video disclosure must be spoken in video not just caption.
actionable_steps: 1. Add AI disclosure to bio ('I'm an AI') 2. Add affiliate disclosure to bio ('Links may be affiliate') 3. Add both disclosures to each sponsored post 4. Spoken disclosure in videos 5. Visual watermark option ('AI-Generated Content') 6. Document compliance practices
reviewer_notes: Compliance requirement. Non-negotiable. Legal risk otherwise.

title: AI Influencer: Own Being AI As Feature
description: Don't apologize for being AI. Own it as feature: Consistency research synthesis 24/7 availability no human bias. Lead with transparency ('I'm an AI [role]'). Find AI advantage (data analysis instant responses unbiased recommendations). Cluely and other successful AI influencers lean into AI identity.
actionable_steps: 1. Add 'I'm an AI' to bio prominently 2. Create content about AI advantages 3. Address 'Can you recommend?' with data-backed responses 4. Use framing: 'Users report...' not 'I experienced...' 5. Highlight AI strengths (consistency data synthesis) 6. Build community through transparent value
reviewer_notes: Positioning strategy. Transparency builds trust faster than hiding AI nature.

title: AI Fitness Coach Persona Monetization
description: AI fitness coach: Affiliate fitness equipment (5-8% MyProtein Bodybuilding.com). Workout plan subscriptions $20-50/mo. Sponsored posts from supplement brands. YouTube ad revenue. Cross-sell to fitness tracking apps. Visual: Athletic AI persona. Voice: Motivational encouraging. Content: Workout demos form tips nutrition basics.

Post daily workout tips 6. Build to 10k followers 7. Pitch supplement sponsors 8. Launch $20/mo workout plan subscription
reviewer_notes: Fitness niche AI influencer playbook. Combine with APP_FACTORY fitness apps.

title: AI Devotional Guide Persona Monetization
description: AI devotional guide: Affiliate Christian books apps devotionals. Subscriptions $5-15/mo for exclusive content. Sponsored posts from faith-based brands. YouTube ad revenue. Digital products (prayer guides study materials) $10-50. Visual: Peaceful approachable AI persona. Voice: Gentle encouraging. Content: Daily devotionals scripture reflections prayer tips.

title: AI Influencer 90/10 Value-Promotion Ratio
description: Content ratio: 90% value 10% promotion. Value content: Educational entertaining engaging helpful. Promotional content: Natural product mentions dedicated reviews comparison content deal alerts. Post daily until something hits then analyze and double down. Track engagement rate by content type.
actionable_steps: 1. Plan 9 value posts per 1 promotional post 2. Value content types: tips tutorials Q&A myth-busting lists 3. Promotional content: honest reviews tool stacks problem-solution 4. Post daily consistently 5. Track engagement rate per content type 6. Double down on high-engagement formats 7. Adjust ratio based on data
reviewer_notes: Content strategy framework. Value-first builds trust for monetization.

source: AI Influencer Tool Stack Starter Budget
title: AI Influencer $40/mo Tool Stack
description: Starter budget $40/mo: Leonardo.ai $12 (visuals). ElevenLabs $22 (voice). D-ID $6 (video). Covers consistent character generation voice synthesis and basic video creation. Upgrade to HeyGen ($24) when revenue hits $500/mo for better video quality.
actionable_steps: 1. Subscribe to Leonardo.ai $12/mo 2. Subscribe to ElevenLabs Creator $22/mo 3. Subscribe to D-ID Lite $6/mo 4. Create character reference sheet Leonardo 5. Lock voice settings ElevenLabs 6. Generate first 10 videos D-ID 7. Upgrade to HeyGen when revenue allows
reviewer_notes: Tool stack for starting AI influencer on budget. $40/mo entry cost.

title: AI Influencer Platform Launch Strategy
description: Platform priority: TikTok primary (growth trends discovery). Instagram secondary (polished aesthetic shopping). YouTube tertiary (depth monetization long-form). X/Twitter for B2B niches and engagement. Start TikTok only until 10k followers then expand to Instagram then YouTube.
actionable_steps: 1. Start with TikTok only 2. Post daily short-form videos 3. Use trending sounds and formats 4. Add AI disclosure in bio and captions 5. Build to 10k followers 6. Expand to Instagram Reels 7. Add YouTube at 25k followers 8. Use X for B2B AI niches only
reviewer_notes: Platform strategy for AI influencers. Focus beats spreading thin.

title: AI Influencer Growth Timeline and Milestones
description: Month 1-3: 0-1k followers minimal revenue learning phase. Month 3-6: 1k-10k followers first affiliate commissions $100-500/mo. Month 6-12: 10k-50k followers sponsorships + affiliates $500-2k/mo. Year 1+: 50k+ followers brand deals multiple streams $2k-10k/mo. Engagement rate target: 3-5% minimum for monetization.
actionable_steps: 1. Track follower growth weekly 2. Measure engagement rate per post 3. Document revenue by stream 4. Celebrate milestones (1k 10k 50k) 5. Adjust strategy at each phase 6. Don't expect revenue month 1-3 7. Focus on 10k followers milestone for brand deals
reviewer_notes: Realistic timeline expectations. Prevents premature monetization push.

title: AI Influencer Content Framing Patterns
description: Instead of 'I love this product' use 'This product consistently gets positive feedback for [specific benefit]'. Instead of 'In my experience...' use 'Users report...' or 'The data shows...'. Instead of 'I recommend' use 'Top-rated option for [use case]'. Data-backed framing builds credibility for AI personas.
actionable_steps: 1. Audit existing content for human-centric framing 2. Replace 'I' statements with data references 3. Use 'Users report' 'Research shows' 'Top-rated' 4. Cite specific benefits with numbers 5. Link to reviews/studies when possible 6. Train voice model on data-backed phrasing
reviewer_notes: Content framing strategy. AI-appropriate language builds trust.

title: AI Influencer Honest Review Framework
description: Every affiliate review includes: 3-5 positives (specific benefits who it's good for what impressed). 1-3 negatives (honest limitations who it's NOT for what could be better). Clear verdict with context. Honesty builds trust reduces returns creates loyal audience ensures FTC compliance.
actionable_steps: 1. Template affiliate reviews with positives/negatives/verdict structure 2. Research product thoroughly before reviewing 3. Include 'Not for...' section 4. Show comparison table for alternatives 5. Link to reviews/specs 6. Add affiliate disclosure clearly 7. Track which reviews convert best
reviewer_notes: Affiliate review structure. Honesty converts better long-term.
